preamble: The relationship between uvular fricatives [ʁ, χ] and the lateral [l] is primarily documented through feature spread (uvularization) and specific dialectal correspondences where the posterior fricative is realized as a lateral or influences its articulation.

examples.note: Uvularization spread where the presence of uvular fricatives triggers the uvularization of the alveolar lateral.
Documented correspondences in specific regional varieties where the guttural rhotic corresponds to lateral realizations.
